name: CircularGallery
description: A WebGL-powered circular image gallery with curved layout, scroll/drag navigation, and per-item text labels. Images are arranged in a continuous horizontal loop with a configurable arc bend.

items.description: Array of gallery items with image URL and label text. Falls back to placeholder images if omitted.

bend.description: Curvature of the circular arc. 0 = flat, higher = more curved. Negative values curve upward.

textColor.description: Color of the text labels below each image.

borderRadius.description: Border radius of each image card (0-0.5, as fraction of card size).

font.description: CSS font string for the text labels.

scrollEase.description: Easing factor for smooth scroll deceleration (0-1, lower = smoother).

examples.title: Basic gallery
Custom items

aiPromptHint: CircularGallery MUST be wrapped in a container with explicit height and position:relative. The component fills its parent. Use 'bend' to control the arc curvature. Items loop infinitely. Supports mouse drag and scroll wheel navigation.
